infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StudyNest uses your camera to capture photos of notes and whiteboards.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: StudyNest records audio so you can capture lectures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: StudyNest can attach images from your photo library to your notes.
